h1: Custom Business Card Holders for Professional Branding
metaDescription: Order custom business card holders for your team or event. Durable materials, full-color print, and low MOQs. Shop at PerfectImprints.com today.
introHtml:
Custom business card holders are a practical and professional way to keep your team’s contact information front and center. Made from durable materials like rigid plastic, soft-touch silicone, or heavy-gauge magnet, these holders ensure your cards stay crisp and accessible. Whether you choose a classic Traverse Business Card Holder for desk use or a Business Card Magnet for quick fridge or file-cabinet access, the construction is built to last through daily handling.

For bulk orders, material choice directly affects decoration quality and longevity. Full-color process printing on 20 Mil magnets delivers vivid brand colors that resist fading, while screen printing on leather or faux-leather card cases offers a subtle, elegant look. Many holders also integrate extra functionality: the Mini Business Card Jotter pairs a notepad with your card slot, and the Business Card Sticky Pack turns your card into a reusable sticky note. These hybrid products give your recipients a reason to keep your brand visible long after the first handshake.

Perfect Imprints stocks a wide range of styles to match different buyer scenarios. Marketing directors may prefer the upscale Lisbon Card Case for client gifts, while HR directors and safety managers often choose high-visibility magnet-backed holders for bulletin boards or break rooms. Business owners appreciate low minimum order quantities and fast turnaround on popular items like the 3 1/2" X 7 1/2" Business Card Add-On™ Magnet with Large Pad. Browse the full collection below to find the right holder for your next event, office refresh, or trade show giveaway.

faqs.q: What materials are custom business card holders made from?
faqs.a: They are typically made from rigid plastic, flexible silicone, heavy-duty magnet, leather or faux leather, or thick cardstock. The material affects durability, decoration method, and feel. Magnets are great for metal surfaces, while leather cases offer a premium unboxing experience.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for business card holders?
faqs.a: Minimums vary by product. Many popular items like the Business Card Magnet or Mini Business Card Jotter can be ordered in quantities as low as 50–100 units. For custom-printed leather cases, minimums may be higher. Check each product page for exact MOQs.

faqs.q: How are logos applied to custom business card holders?
faqs.a: Common decoration methods include full-color digital print, screen print, pad print, and laser engraving. Full-color print works best on flat magnet surfaces, while screen print is ideal for textured cases. Laser engraving provides a permanent, elegant mark on metal or wood.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes, Perfect Imprints offers sample requests for most products. You can order a single unit with your chosen decoration to verify material, color, and print quality before committing to a larger quantity. Contact our sales team for details.

faqs.q: How long does production and delivery take?
faqs.a: Standard production takes 5–10 business days after proof approval, depending on the decoration method. Expedited options may be available. Shipping time varies by method. Magnet and pad-holder products often have faster turnaround than sewn leather cases.

heroAltText: A group of custom business card holders including a magnet, a leather case, and a jotter with notepad, displaying printed logos.
